title: ranunculus alpestris subsp. bilobus
intro: Ranunculus alpestris subsp. bilobus, also known as the Alpine Buttercup, is a plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ranunculus alpestris subsp. bilobus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions or tinctures, which are often used to treat skin conditions and promote overall well-being.
